UAV/WSN Simulator
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AlgorithmConfig
Deprecated.
Renamed to GaAcoConfig.
AntColonyOptimization
Ant Colony Optimisation (ACO) stage of the GA→ACO fusion path planner, with concurrent ant tour construction and multiple iteration loops.
AppConfig
File-backed configuration for the UAV/WSN simulator.
CoverageGrid
Coarse coverage tracker that divides the simulation field into sectors and records which sectors have been scanned by the UAV.
DashboardGui
Unified single-window dashboard styled after IntelliJ IDEA Darcula.
Environment
The simulation grid and sensor-node registry.
EventScheduler
Priority-queue–based event scheduler for the discrete-event simulation.
EventScheduler.Event
An immutable simulation event.
GaAcoConfig
Immutable configuration for the GA-ACO fusion path-planning algorithm and the planning schedule used by GaAcoIntelligence.
GaAcoIntelligence
UAVIntelligence implementation that combines frontier-based coverage exploration with coverage-gated GA→ACO→LocalSearch path planning.
GaAcoPlanner
Stateless implementation of PathPlanner using a three-stage GA → ACO → LocalSearch fusion pipeline.
GaAcoTest
Self-contained demonstration of the GA→ACO fusion path planner.
GeneticAlgorithm
Genetic Algorithm stage of the GA→ACO fusion path planner.
KnowledgeBase
Per-UAV accumulator of sensor-node knowledge.
LaunchDialog
Professional modal launch dialog shown before every simulation run.
LevyWalkStrategy
Lévy-walk movement strategy — the default mobility model for sensor nodes.
LocalSearch
Stateless local-search passes for TSP-style open-path optimisation.
MarkovChain
Markov-chain state machine for sensor-node mobility models.
MovementStrategy
Strategy interface for sensor-node mobility models.
NodeAgent
A mutable sensor-node agent in the discrete-event simulation.
NodeDeploymentStrategy
Strategy for deploying sensor nodes (or other targets) into the simulation environment at the start of each pass.
NodeMover
8-directional grid movement for sensor nodes.
PathPlanner
Strategy interface for UAV route-planning algorithms.
PheromoneMatrix
Encapsulates the pheromone trail matrix used by the Ant Colony Optimisation stage.
Population
A mutable, ordered collection of Route objects representing one generation in the Genetic Algorithm.
PredefinedPatrolIntelligence
No-op UAVIntelligence implementation that represents the predefined four-corner patrol baseline.
Route
An immutable, ordered sequence of SensorNode objects representing one planned UAV path through the sensor network.
RunConfig
Immutable data class capturing all parameters chosen in LaunchDialog for one simulation run.
SensorNode
Represents a wireless sensor node in the UAV data-collection network.
SimulationConfig
Immutable configuration for the discrete-event UAV/WSN simulator.
SimulationConfig.Builder
 
SimulationGui
Professional Swing GUI for comparing N UAV intelligence strategies side-by-side.
SimulationPanel
Custom JPanel that renders one tick of the UAV/WSN simulation.
SimulationRunner
Discrete-event simulation runner for UAV/WSN experiments.
SimulationRunner.PassCompleteCallback
Notified when a single simulation pass finishes.
SimulationScenario
Composition root for a simulation experiment.
SimulationSnapshot
Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at one drone-event tick.
SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
Immutable snapshot of a single sensor node's state at one tick.
UAV
The UAV (drone) entity in the discrete-event simulation.
UAV.DriveMode
 
UAVIntelligence
Strategy interface for a UAV's autonomous decision-making per tick.
VisualizationListener
Callback interface invoked by SimulationRunner after every drone-event tick when a visualization listener is registered.
WSNDataCollectionScenario
The original MSc thesis scenario: a UAV collecting data tokens from a wireless sensor network deployed across a field configured via config.properties.
